hooks.command: cd /home/user/Zoobicon.com && if git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'CLAUDE.md'; then echo '{"systemMessage": "✅ CLAUDE.md was updated in this session."}'; elif git diff --name-only HEAD~1..HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'CLAUDE.md'; then echo '{"systemMessage": "✅ CLAUDE.md was updated in recent commits."}'; else echo '{"systemMessage": "⚠️ CLAUDE.md was NOT updated this session. If you made significant changes (new features, architecture decisions, bug fixes, technology upgrades), update CLAUDE.md before ending. This is a mandatory rule — every achievement must be documented."}'; fi
